title: Doff Tomato Pour & Feed – 1.5L Fast-Acting Vegetable Plant Food for Healthy Growth of Tomatoes, Vegetables & Flowers – Seaweed Enriched Tomato Feed – Encourages Root Development
features: VERSATILE PLANT FEED – Boost the health of tomatoes, vegetables, and flowering plants with Doff Tomato Pour & Feed. Enriched with seaweed and magnesium, this fast-acting plant fertiliser promotes healthier, stronger plants

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Ready-to-use tomato feed formula containing essential nutrients to strengthen roots, enhance flowering, and support the growth of juicy, flavourful tomatoes. Simply pour 2.5 caps of the tomato feed liquid directly at the base of the plant, every 4-7 days

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This tomato feed for plants is supplied premixed for ultimate convenience. Whether nurturing tomatoes, courgettes, aubergines, squash, sweet peppers, and more, Doff’s tomato plant food saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality vegetable feed provides consistent nutrition for thriving plants throughout the growing season. Ideal for indoor and outdoor plants, it increases yield in plants large and small. Available in 1.5L and 3L sizes

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow
